title: kagent values
description: Dependency-wrapper for the upstream kagent chart (aliased to `kagentapp`). Values pass through under `kagentapp`.

global.title: Global values
global.description: Helm global values propagated to the upstream subchart.

kagentapp.title: Upstream kagent passthrough
kagentapp.description: Values forwarded to the upstream kagent subchart (providers, per-agent enabled flags, tool server, etc.).
